title: Alistar Dadefra

'''Alistar Dadefra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Bombard]]'' during the [[Battle of Khuiumin]]. He later commanded the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Brazen]]'' in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. He was killed in the Star Destroyer's destruction by a group of Rebels.

==Biography==
Alistar Dadefra was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="Elrood" /> born in [[57 BBY/Legends|57 BBY]]. He joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], rising to a command level position by [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]].<ref name="Elrood" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="GNN6">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref> Dadefra was in command of the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Bombard]]''. Alongside the [[Crusader (Victory-class)|''Crusader'']], Dadefra [[Battle of Khuiumin|smashed]] the [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] in the [[Khuiumin system/Legends|Khuiumin system]]. Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, he was assigned to the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], commanding the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Brazen]]''. He was killed when the ''Brazen'' was destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents while it was undergoing repairs at the [[Derilyn Space Defense Platform]].<ref name="Elrood" />
